bird.name: 戴氏火背鹇
bird.summary: 戴氏火背鹇（學名：Lophura diardi），又名泰國火背鷴，是一種中等大小，約有80厘米長的雉。雄雞呈灰色，大部份面部沒有羽毛及呈紅色，腳呈深紅色，冠上羽毛呈黑色，虹膜呈紅褐色，尾巴長而彎曲及呈黑色。雌雞呈褐色，雙翼及尾羽黑色。 泰國火背鷴分佈在柬埔寨、老撾、泰國及越南的…

relations.subject: 戴氏火背鹇
relations.evidence: Due to habitat loss and over-hunting in some areas, the Siamese fireback was evaluated as Near Threatened on the IUCN Red List; however, it is now Least Concern
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 戴氏火背鹇
relations.evidence: Due to habitat loss and over-hunting in some areas, the Siamese fireback was evaluated as Near Threatened on the IUCN Red List; however, it is now Least Concern
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
